rationale: The proposed homestead exemption increase under Tax Code §11.13(b) concerns property tax appraised value exemptions. Educ. Code §29.404 governs junior college dropout prevention funding eligibility. No overlap or interaction exists.
quote: To the extent consistent with the General Appropriations Act, a public junior college under this subchapter is eligible to receive dropout prevention and intervention program funds appropriated to the agency.
_note: No conflict; rule concerns junior college dropout prevention funding, unrelated to property tax homestead exemptions.
